name: Golfzon Social - Palisades Center
address: 3565 Palisades Center Dr, West Nyack, NY 10994
about: Golfzon Social - Palisades Center is an indoor golf and entertainment venue that combines advanced golf simulators with a full-service sports bar and event spaces. The facility features cutting-edge technology with a vast selection of over 240 world-famous golf courses, allowing for immersive play regardless of weather conditions. It operates on a per-bay, hourly pricing model with a social atmosphere designed for both golf and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 240 virtually recreated world-famous golf courses
Flexible event spaces for tournaments, private parties, and corporate outings
Full-service sports bar with elevated bar food and local beers

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with local beers and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Guests are highly encouraged to bring their own clubs, but rental sets for adults, kids, and left-handed players are available on a first-come, first-served basis.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full-service sports bar with food and drinks available for purchase. External food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For the average golfer, it takes approximately 45 minutes to 1 hour to play a round of 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and provides a safe environment where players of all ages can bond over golf or games, making it suitable for family outings.
